name: Frogger
description: Frogger is an action game where the player controls a frog attempting to cross a busy road and a dangerous river to reach home. The game screen is divided into distinct horizontal zones. The bottom portion of the screen represents the starting area and the road, featuring multiple lanes of traffic moving horizontally in opposing directions at varying speeds. Contact with any vehicle is fatal. Above the road is a safe zone or median. Beyond the median lies the river, filled with hazards such as logs and turtles which move horizontally. The frog can ride these objects to traverse the river. Falling into the water is fatal. The goal is to guide the frog to one of five destination lily pads at the top of the screen. Once a frog successfully reaches a lily pad, it remains there, and the player continues with another frog. The game ends when all available frogs have been lost. Some lily pads may contain bonuses (such as a lady frog) that provides the player with more points when a frog reaches them. These bonuses can also be a hazard, like a snake. Once all five lily pads are filled, the game resets with a new set of frogs.

controls.arrow_up: Move the frog upwards one hop.
controls.arrow_down: Move the frog downwards one hop.
controls.arrow_left: Move the frog leftwards one hop.
controls.arrow_right: Move the frog rightwards one hop.
